item.title: phillbarrs: Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 1min Another OG hangs up the boots, feels like the end and the last remains of an era #Wrestle
item.description:
Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 1min Another OG hangs up the boots, feels like the end and the last remains of an era #WrestleMania Cita WWE @WWE · 4min Brock Lesnar leaves his gear in the ring. What's next for The Beast?
The FIRST HOUR of #WrestleMania is LIVE RIGHT NOW on ESPN! 74

item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 4min “It means everything”
Xiao Guodong says winning at the Crucible hits differently after beating go
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 4min “It means everything”
Xiao Guodong says winning at the Crucible hits differently after beating good friend Zhou Yuelong 10-6 in the first round.
#WorldChampionship 1 3 550

item.title: WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 3min En respuesta a @WeAreWST Watch the full interview here: wst.tv WINNING INTERVIEW - Xiao Guodong vs

item.title: phillbarrs: Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 6min The Beast completely breaking character to say goodbye as well #wrestlemania 1 2 213

item.title: MarkWilsonRadio: Mark Wilson @MarkWilsonRadio · 8min Fair play Matt Fitzpatrick. Superb play off hole to win it again. #rbcheritage 1 303

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 10min Ten European Tour titles, Gezzy? Ten? That's insane!
Gerwyn Price powered to a tenth Eu
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 10min Ten European Tour titles, Gezzy? Ten? That's insane!
Gerwyn Price powered to a tenth European Tour title of his career, defeating Ross Smith 8-6 in the final to claim the European Darts Grand Prix in Sindelfingen!
Read our round-up or watch the highlights on the PDC app 1 51 4 mil
